name: Client Operating Model Phase 6 Build Virtual Lab State
outcome_goal: Implement Virtual Lab environment revision, seed, copy-on-write state, event envelope, causality, digest, receipt, CQRS contract, and tests.
anti_requirements: Do not stage or commit git changes.
Do not mutate Object Truth directly from Virtual Lab commands.
Do not create an unqueryable event model.
Do not skip pre/post state digest checks on mutating events.
Do not regenerate shared docs/API.md, docs/CLI.md, or docs/MCP.md in this parallel chain; Phase 11 owns final shared surface docs.

jobs.label: phase_06_virtual_lab_state_build
jobs.prompt: Build Phase 6 from artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_06_virtual_lab_state/PLAN.md. Implement a bounded Virtual Lab state substrate: immutable environment revisions, deterministic seed manifests from Object Truth refs, copy-on-write object overlays, canonical event envelopes with causality, pre/post digests, stream sequence rules, snapshot/digest helpers, and read/write operation contracts where appropriate. Preserve CQRS/gateway patterns and migration authority. Add tests for deterministic seeds, copy-on-write isolation, event ordering, digest recomputation, closed revision rejection, and replay. Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/build_reports/phase_06_IMPLEMENTATION.md with changed files, validation, blockers, and Phase 7 runtime contract notes. Do not stage or commit.
